6952ced4bcc1dd1e3c80dfcb Description: Leader of the SRT Academy Rabbit squad. Stationed at Kivotos Rabbit Park; started operating an carry service due to financial hardship.
Mcs/EnableLooting Description: Whether carry service players perform the behavior of looting loot
Mcs/PriceThreshold Description: Loot below this price will be ignored
Mcs/KeywordItemText Description: Keywords are substrings contained in an item's full or abbreviated name. Multiple keywords can be separated using “||”, “,” or “，”
Mcs/MiyakoTraderOrderNewQuest:
You have successfully placed your order! You can view your order details in the Trader Tasks menu.
Just accept the order and proceed with payment!
Mcs/MiyakoTraderTicketNewQuest:
A new ticket has been issued. You can view the details in the Trader Tasks menu.
Accept the ticket and make the payment to waive part of the price increase penalty.
Mcs/MiyakoTraderUnrecognizedCommand: Unknown command! Type "help" to see available commands.
Mcs/MiyakoTraderInventoryModeRefuse: You are currently in mcs player inventory mode and cannot use commands.
Mcs/MiyakoTraderAvailableCommandsList: The available commands will be listed below:
Mcs/MiyakoTraderSpecialHelp: Friendly reminder: Please do not intentionally kill carry service players, this behavior will result in permanent price increase!
Mcs/MiyakoTraderRefund: Order/Ticket not settled, this is a refund.
Mcs/MiyakoTraderCompensation: Compensation for accidentally killing the miyako carry service boss.
Mcs/TeamCommand TargetName: Issue commands to all carry service players
Mcs/MemberCommand TargetName: Issue commands to specific carry service players
Mcs/TeamForceTeleportCommand TargetName: Clear goal enemy from all carry service players and attempt to teleport them to your current location
Mcs/ForceTeleportCommand TargetName: Clear carry service player goal enemy and attempt to teleport them to your current location
Mcs/OpenInventoryCommand TargetName: Open carry service player inventory remotely
Mcs/ReportAboutEnemyCommand TargetName: Command carry service player to report known enemy positions
Mcs/TeamReportAboutEnemyCommand TargetNa: All carry service players report known enemy positions
Mcs/RegroupCommand TargetName: Command carry service player to follow the boss
Mcs/TeamRegroupCommand TargetName: All carry service players follow the boss
Mcs/GoToPointCommand TargetName: Command carry service player to go to designated location
Mcs/TeamGoToPointCommand TargetName: Command carry service players to go to designated location
Mcs/HoldPositionCommand TargetName: Command carry service player to stay in place
Mcs/TeamHoldPositionCommand TargetName: All carry service players stay in place
Mcs/OnLoot: Reached the loot location, here is {0} ({1}).
Mcs/OnLootQuestItem: This is a quest item and must be picked up by you.
Mcs/OnLootNoSpace: I have no more space to loot item.
Mcs/ReturnToMainCharRefuse: This player is not a carry service player, unable to open inventory
Mcs/ReturnToMainCharTip: Please select the carry service player currently in Mcs Inventory Mode to return to the main character
Mcs/ReturnToMainCharNoWeapon: Please equip the carry service player with at least one gun
Mcs/CannotRaidInMcsInventoryMode: Currently in Mcs Inventory Mode, unable to enter the raid
